title: aquilegia viscosa var. decipiens
intro: Aquilegia viscosa var. decipiens, also known as the sticky or glandular columbine, is a plant species within the buttercup family. It has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Aquilegia viscosa var. decipiens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health concerns.
